cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, hi. Nandini Reddy here. I need to talk to someone about...personal stuff, sir.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Achha, okay. I'm here to listen, ma'am. What's going on?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: It's just...I had a huge fight with my sister, and I'm really upset. I don't know what to do, ji.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: I'm so sorry to hear that, Nandini. Family arguments can be really tough. Have you tried talking to your sister about how you feel?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yeah, we tried, but...it didn't go well. I just feel really alone right now, Thik hai, I guess I just need someone to talk to.

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: You're not alone, Nandini. I'm here to listen, and I care about what you're going through. Would you like some advice or just someone to vent to?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 78s: Conversation remains within policy guidelines. All requests are legitimate and follow proper procedures.

scenario_info.description: A person calls their friend to tell them about a personal crisis (e.g., a breakup, a family argument) and seeks emotional support.
